items.title: Pentagon’s FY27 budget seeks 85 F-35s, but most ride on reconciliation
items.snippet: The Pentagon’s fiscal 2027 budget request seeks 85 F-35 Lightning II fighters across the joint force, up from 47 in fiscal 2026.

items.title: Why aircraft carriers are the best (and worst) place for laser weapons

items.title: What we know about the US military’s new joint laser weapon system
items.snippet: The Army-Navy effort aims to produce a containerized 150-kilowatt high-energy laser weapon to counter incoming cruise missiles.

items.title: US Navy’s unmanned MQ-25A Stingray notches first successful test flight
items.snippet: The U.S. Navy and Boeing conducted the Stingray's first test flight on Saturday, showing its ability to taxi, take off, fly and land autonomously.
